resume_context.last_turn_summary:
Extracted the shared post-turn auto-commit flow into [commit_helper.ex](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-48/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/agent_provider/commit_helper.ex) and rewired both [claude.ex](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-48/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/agent_provider/claude.ex) and [codex_cli.ex](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-48/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/agent_provider/codex_cli.ex) to use it. The helper now owns changed-file detection, progress-file patching, optional `mix format` plus auto-commit, and `report_agent_turn_result` synthesis. I kept Claude’s existing test helper surface intact by redirecting those wrappers to the shared module, and added direct unit coverage in [commit_helper_test.exs](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-48/elixir/test/symphony_elixir/commit_helper_test.exs).

Focused verification passed: `mix test test/symphony_elixir/commit_helper_test.exs` and `mix test test/symphony_elixir/agent_provider_claude_test.exs`. I updated [CLZ-48.md](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-48/.symphony/progress/CLZ-48.md) with the work log and evidence. I did not run repo-owned validation or touch the pre-existing dirty [run_state.json](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-48/.symphony/run_state.json).
